req.title: Hr-Admin deletes department
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to delete a department through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: This test suite validates the hr-admin department deletion capability across three primary test vectors: (1) positive case exercising the happy path with valid authentication and complete mandatory fields, resulting in successful deletion and audit trail creation; (2) negative case covering authentication and authorization failures that must reject with 401/403; (3) boundary case testing edge conditions such as non-existent department IDs and mandatory field validation errors returning 400. The suite applies Equivalence Partitioning to partition valid/invalid input states, Boundary Value Analysis for edge case IDs, Negative Path coverage for auth failures, and Decision Table logic for role-based access control.

tests.name: test_hr_admin_delete_department_success
preconditions: department with id=dept_001 exists in system
user session contains valid jwt token
actions: send DELETE request to /departments/dept_001 with authorization header
include request body with mandatory field: department_id=dept_001
expected: response body contains deleted department entity with id=dept_001
audit log record exists with action=DELETE, actor=hr_admin_user, entity_id=dept_001
trace: R-WEB-007: hr-admin authenticated, department module enabled
R-WEB-007: delete endpoint invoked with valid mandatory fields
R-WEB-007: expected outcome met—department deleted and audit record written
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_hr_admin_delete_department_success():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_jwt_token>'}
    dept_id = 'dept_001'
    
    resp = requests.delete(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        json={'department_id': dept_id},
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code in [200, 201]
    assert resp.json()['id'] == dept_id
    
    verify_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        headers=headers
    )
    assert verify_resp.status_code == 404
    
    audit_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/audit-logs?entity_id={dept_id}&action=DELETE',
        headers=headers
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    assert len(audit_resp.json()['logs']) > 0

tests.name: test_hr_admin_delete_department_unauthorized
preconditions: user is not authenticated OR has invalid jwt token
department with id=dept_001 exists in system
actions: send DELETE request to /departments/dept_001 without authorization header or with expired token
expected: response body contains error message indicating authentication required
department record still exists in system (not deleted)
trace: R-WEB-007: request rejected before deletion logic executes
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_hr_admin_delete_department_unauthorized():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    dept_id = 'dept_001'
    
    resp = requests.delete(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        json={'department_id': dept_id},
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer invalid_token'}
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    assert 'authentication' in resp.json()['error'].lower()
    
    verify_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_jwt_token>'}
    )
    assert verify_resp.status_code == 200

tests.name: test_hr_admin_delete_department_forbidden_role
preconditions: user authenticated with role != hr-admin (e.g., role=viewer)
department with id=dept_001 exists in system
actions: send DELETE request to /departments/dept_001 with authorization header for non-admin user
expected: response body contains error message indicating insufficient privileges
department record still exists in system
trace: R-WEB-007: error pathway 403 if role forbidden
R-WEB-007: request rejected due to role-based access control
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_hr_admin_delete_department_forbidden_role():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <viewer_role_token>'}
    dept_id = 'dept_001'
    
    resp = requests.delete(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        json={'department_id': dept_id},
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 403
    assert 'forbidden' in resp.json()['error'].lower()
    
    verify_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <admin_token>'}
    )
    assert verify_resp.status_code == 200

tests.name: test_hr_admin_delete_department_nonexistent_id
preconditions: department with id=nonexistent_dept_999 does NOT exist
actions: send DELETE request to /departments/nonexistent_dept_999 with valid authorization
expected: response status code is 404 Not Found
response body contains error message indicating department not found
no audit record created for non-existent entity
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_hr_admin_delete_department_nonexistent_id():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_jwt_token>'}
    dept_id = 'nonexistent_dept_999'
    
    resp = requests.delete(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        json={'department_id': dept_id},
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 404
    assert 'not found' in resp.json()['error'].lower()
    
    audit_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/audit-logs?entity_id={dept_id}&action=DELETE',
        headers=headers
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    assert len(audit_resp.json()['logs']) == 0

tests.name: test_hr_admin_delete_department_missing_mandatory_field
preconditions: department with id=dept_002 exists in system
actions: send DELETE request to /departments/dept_002 with authorization header
omit mandatory field department_id from request body
expected: response status code is 400 Bad Request
response body contains validation error message for missing mandatory field
department record still exists in system (not deleted)
trace: R-WEB-007: error pathway 400 on validation error
R-WEB-007: request rejected before deletion logic executes
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_hr_admin_delete_department_missing_mandatory_field():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_jwt_token>'}
    dept_id = 'dept_002'
    
    resp = requests.delete(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        json={},
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    assert 'required' in resp.json()['error'].lower() or 'mandatory' in resp.json()['error'].lower()
    
    verify_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/departments/{dept_id}',
        headers=headers
    )
    assert verify_resp.status_code == 200
